name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Tempe, AZ's TitleMax Title Loans at 19 E Broadway Rd offers fast title loans for same-day cash.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans is located at 19 E Broadway Rd in Tempe, AZ, operating as a standalone storefront in this central Tempe commercial corridor. The location serves Tempe residents seeking quick access to title-backed lending with convenient street parking and easy foot traffic access. Hours of operation are Monday–Friday 9 AM–7 PM (closing at 6 PM Tuesday–Thursday), Saturday 10 AM–4 PM, and closed Sundays.

This Tempe, AZ branch specializes in title loans—a secured borrowing option where you pledge your vehicle's title for quick cash. The team at this location handles applications, document review, and funding decisions on-site. For questions about loan terms, eligibility, or to schedule an appointment, call +1 480-968-1401.

If you need fast cash and own a vehicle free and clear, the Tempe store at 19 E Broadway Rd is accessible during business hours. Bring your vehicle title, photo ID, and proof of residency to apply. TitleMax processes loans quickly, often within the same day or next business day.
pros: Same-day cash funding for approved applicants
Accepts most credit types; credit score not primary qualification factor
Keep driving your vehicle while loan is active
Flexible line of credit options allowing partial or full withdrawals
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended business hours (open until 7pm weekdays, 4pm Saturday)
5.0/5 star customer rating across 481+ verified Google reviews
cons: APR and rate structure not disclosed on website; title loans historically carry 100-300%+ APRs
Vehicle repossession risk if unable to repay secured title loan
High-cost emergency debt; total repayment often significantly exceeds initial loan amount
Personal line of credit requires bank account and proof of income; not available nationwide (10 states only for online)
best_for: Consumers with vehicles and clear titles needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers with poor credit history unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Memphis-area residents seeking convenient in-person lending with bilingual support
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area residents facing genuine emergencies who own vehicles with clear titles and need cash in 24 hours. The critical caveat: title loans are predatory-rate debt instruments with APRs typically 100-300% or higher; they should only be considered as absolute last resort before payday loans, and borrowers face repossession risk. The company's strong local reviews reflect good customer service, but do not reflect the inherent cost and risk structure of title lending itself.
services: Title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit secured by vehicle equity
Unsecured personal lines of credit (online and in-store)
Account management portals for title loans
Account management portals for personal loans
Vehicle appraisal services (implied via loan qualification)
Multiple location access across Memphis area
Payment flexibility and customized payment plans
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 19 E Broadway Rd, Tempe, AZ. Fast title loans for same-day cash.
